---
name: Pull request
about: Open a pull request
---

## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Changes

-

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] Feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Build / CI / configuration (`build:`, `ci:`, `chore:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (lint + format + knip)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Translation keys added/updated in all three `messages/` files
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated if architecture or conventions changed
- [ ] Linked to a related issue (if applicable)
